caption: The video features an elderly man with white hair and glasses, dressed in a blue shirt adorned with bird patterns and a colorful sash, standing behind a podium with a microphone. He appears to be speaking or presenting, as he is looking down, possibly reading from notes or a script. The setting seems to be indoors, with wooden blinds visible in the background, suggesting a formal event or conference. The man's attire includes a necklace with a pendant, adding a cultural or personal touch to his appearance. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen, indicating the organization or event associated with the video. The audience is partially visible, with some heads in the foreground, attentively listening to the speaker.
